pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Architecture & Analytics KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.404) to justify inclusion for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Data and AI Strategy Consultant roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Architecture & Analytics is not a standard competency expectation for Data and AI Strategy Consultant. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Data and AI Strategy Consultant competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.404) and edge-domain placement (Data Architecture & Analytics) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. All passes support exclusion.
